title: Crispy Prawn Fresco
description: A quick-fix Mediterranean dish featuring fermented prawns, crispy texture, and low-calorie-friendly option.

ingredients.name: fermented prawns
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for at least an hour

instructions: Prepare the fermented prawns by soaking them in water for at least an hour. Pat dry with paper towels.
In a mixing bowl, combine the chopped fresh parsley and soy sauce.
Add the olive oil to the mixture and mix well until everything is evenly coated.
Place the prawns on a plate or tray lined with parchment paper, ensuring they are not overlapping.
Drizzle the marinade over the prawns evenly. Let them marinate for 10 minutes at room temperature.
Once ready, place the prawn mixture in the preheated oven and bake for about 8-10 minutes or until they turn golden brown and crispy.
